webflow.title: Shop Mini Globe Demo
webflow.description: Build a Shopify Shop Mini backed by Gadget. Authenticate buyers, persist per-buyer shipments, and visualize tracking paths on an interactive 3D globe.

miniBuyer.description: Represents a Shop Mini buyer (verified or guest) identified by a stable publicId. Tracks the buyer's verification state and Shop token expiration, and links to their session and shipments.

shipment.description: Stores a tracking number and the geocoded route path used by the Shop Mini globe to visualize where a shipment has traveled. Scoped to a single miniBuyer.

session.description: Extends the default session model with a `miniBuyer` relationship so the Shop Mini auth flow can hydrate a session for the authenticated buyer.

create.description: Creates a miniBuyer record when a Shop Mini buyer first authenticates via the Shop token verification flow.

update.description: Updates an existing miniBuyer (e.g. refreshing `tokenExpiresAt` or `state`) on subsequent authentications.

delete.description: Deletes a miniBuyer and cascades through their shipments and session.

create.description: Creates a shipment record with a tracking number and a geocoded path for the globe visualization.

update.description: Updates a shipment's path or `lastFetchedAt` timestamp when tracking data is refreshed.

delete.description: Removes a shipment from a buyer's tracked list.

miniBuyer.description: Grants authenticated Shop Mini buyers read access to their own miniBuyer record via a Gelly filter.

shipment.description: Grants authenticated Shop Mini buyers read access to shipments belonging to their miniBuyer via a Gelly filter.

web/routes/_app._index.tsx.description: The embedded Shopify admin dashboard for the app. Renders an AutoTable of installed shops and links into the Gadget editor.

minis/shop-mini-globe-demo/src/App.tsx.description: The Shop Mini entrypoint. Authenticates the buyer, renders the interactive 3D globe, and lets the user submit tracking numbers to plot shipments.

minis/shop-mini-globe-demo/src/component.description: The interactive globe component that renders shipment routes as animated arcs between geocoded coordinates.

minis/shop-mini-globe-demo/src/hooks/use.description: React hook that exchanges a Shop Mini token for a Gadget JWT and exposes the authenticated state to the Shop Mini.

api/routes/shop-mini/POST-auth.ts.description: Verifies a Shop Mini token against the Shop Admin API, upserts the corresponding miniBuyer + session, and returns a signed Gadget JWT scoped to the buyer.

api/routes/shop-mini/GET-shipments.ts.description: Authenticated route that returns the list of shipments belonging to the calling miniBuyer for rendering on the globe.

api/routes/shop-mini/POST-tracking.ts.description: Authenticated route that accepts a tracking number, geocodes the shipment's route into lat/lng coordinates, and persists it as a shipment record.

api/shopMiniUtils/verify.ts.description: Utility that verifies a Shop Mini buyer token by calling the Shop Admin API and extracting the buyer's publicId, state, and token expiration.
